# GitHub Issue Templates

GitHub issue form templates for collecting structured bug reports, feature requests, and tasks.

## Directory Index

- [`1-bug-report.yml`](1-bug-report.yml) - Form for reporting bugs with description and stack trace details.
- [`2-feature-request.yml`](2-feature-request.yml) - Form for proposing new features with acceptance criteria.
- [`3-task.yml`](3-task.yml) - Form for general tasks and chores with acceptance criteria.
- [`config.yml`](config.yml) - Issue template chooser configuration.
